title: Feather Standalone Boosted
description: A modpack to boost FPS in Feather Standalone.
body:
# **A FPS Improover for Feather Standalone**
Feather Standalone Boosted is a meticulously crafted modpack aimed at enhancing the performance of Feather Standalone by significantly improving FPS (Frames Per Second). Tailored for Minecraft Java Edition version 1.21.8 and built on the Fabric platform, this modpack brings together a suite of performance-boosting mods, including Feather, Starlight, Lithium, Sodium, Iris Shaders, ModernFix, FerriteCore, and more. These mods work in harmony to deliver a smoother and more efficient gameplay experience. Designed with lightweight and optimized mods, it’s perfect for players seeking to elevate their game performance without sacrificing features. The pack also includes utility mods like Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib, and Fabric Language Kotlin, as well as client-side improvements such as ImmediatelyFast, Accurate Block Placement Reborn, and Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR). Launched on March 27, 2025, as a release version (1.0.0), Feather Standalone Boosted is available as a 235.55 MB .mrpack file. Whether you’re on a low-spec system or just want to maximize your FPS, this modpack offers an ideal solution for a refined Minecraft experience.
Some mods credit from - Spunky Insaan.
